questionHtml: Outline why work must be done on ring B as it moves towards ring A at a constant speed.
markschemeHtml:
the current induced in B gives rise to a magnetic field opposing that of A

OR

there will be a magnetic force opposing the motion ✓

work must be done to move B in the opposite direction to this force ✓

meta.title: Outline why work must be done on ring B as it moves towards ring A at a constant speed.
